raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Legislation aims to ensure that at-promise youth in foster care and juvenile detention facilities receive the same respect and resources as other children.",
    "The proposed bills seek to improve outcomes for youth by reducing exposure to traumatic experiences.",
    "AB 2247 aims to reduce the number of destabilizing placement changes that foster youth experience.",
    "Foster youth can undergo over 100 placement changes over the years.",
    "AB 2337 seeks to eliminate barriers for youth aged 18 to 21 to enter or re-enter extended foster care.",
    "AB 2448 enables youth in foster care and juvenile detention facilities to access the Internet for educational purposes and to connect with family."
  ]
}
```
